message:
build: use git dependency for rich_rust instead of local path

Switch rich_rust dependency from local path (/dp/rich_rust) to git URL
(https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git) to enable CI builds.

Local path dependencies don't exist in the GitHub Actions environment,
causing cargo to fail when trying to resolve the dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,8 +45,8 @@ colored = "3.1"
 indicatif = "0.18"
 crossterm = "0.28"
 
-# Rich terminal output (sibling project - path dependency for synchronized development)
-rich_rust = { path = "/dp/rich_rust", features = ["full"] }
+# Rich terminal output (sibling project)
+rich_rust = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust.git", features = ["full"] }
 
 # Utilities
 once_cell = "1.19"
